title: Next.js OpenClaw Fetch Hardening
summary: Added safe fetch wrappers for OpenClaw polling in sidebar and header
Prevented unhandled promise/runtime errors on failed fetches
Kept UI operational when OpenClaw gateway is unavailable
rollback_steps: Revert safe fetch helpers and polling callback wrappers in AgentsSidebar.tsx/Header.tsx
open_items: Apply safe-fetch polling wrapper to remaining dashboard components
